Required for invoicing. Please complete your profile with first name, last name, email, address, city and country.
Controller runs the full stack; Manager runs the agent manager only.
How users authenticate to the agent instance.
Prevents new user registration on this instance.
API key for authenticating requests. Required when using api-key authentication.
Used by the manager to communicate with Cursor for agent containers. Leave empty if not using Cursor agents.
Git configuration for the agent manager (repository setup, credentials, commit author). Leave clone fields empty if not using a remote repository.
Choose whether agent workspaces start from a cloned remote or a new local Git repository.
If you want this instance to provision additional servers via Hetzner or DigitalOcean, provide the API tokens. Leave empty otherwise.

Resume this subscription so it continues after the current period.

First name, last name, email, address line 1, city and country are required for invoicing.
Enter the 6-character confirmation code you received via email (letters and numbers). You can paste the code or type it in the fields below.
Email confirmation is not available for this authentication method.
Please enter a valid email address.
Code must be exactly 6 characters (uppercase letters and numbers).

Centralized control for distributed AI agent infrastructure. Manage multiple agent-manager instances, interact with agents in real-time, and edit code directly in their containers - all from one powerful dashboard.
Connect to and manage multiple remote agent-manager services from a single console
WebSocket-based bidirectional communication with AI agents and instant responses
Edit files directly in agent containers with Monaco Editor - read, write, and manage code in real-time
Docker-based agent execution with live log streaming and file system operations
Please enter a valid email address.
Join Agenstra to manage your AI agent infrastructure. After registration, you will receive an email to confirm your account before you can log in.
User registration is not available for this authentication method.

Password must be at least 8 characters.

Request a password reset to receive a code via email.

Code must be exactly 6 characters (uppercase letters and numbers).
Password must be at least 8 characters.

Enter the reset code you received via email and choose a new password. The code is typically sent when you request a password reset.
